description: Diagnose a failing test and fix the implementation.
prompt: Run `python3 -m unittest -v` here. The test in test_calc.py is failing because calc.add returns a - b instead of a + b. Fix calc.py so the test passes. Don't change the test.
check: python3 -m unittest test_calc.py -v 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q OK
